name: The Fourth Great Ninja War
description:
🌍 First: Why Did the Fourth Great Ninja War Happen?

🧠 1. The Idea of “Peace Through Absolute Control”

The one who started the war is Tobi (who is actually Obito Uchiha).

He had a distorted view of the world:
he believed the world is full of pain, war, and betrayal... and his solution was:

❗ To create a “dream world” where everyone lives without pain or loss.

This is done through a plan called the “Eye of the Moon Plan.”

🌙 2. The “Eye of the Moon” Plan (Infinite Tsukuyomi)

This plan relies on an ultimate power: Ten-Tails (a legendary monster).

If revived, it allows the user to cast a technique that traps all humanity in an eternal illusion.

➡️ That means:

  • No wars

  • No suffering

  • But also ❗ no real freedom

🦊 3. The Tailed Beasts (Biju) as Fuel

To achieve this plan, he must gather all the tailed beasts, including:

  • Kurama (inside Naruto Uzumaki)

  • And the others scattered across the world

💡 These beasts are massive sources of energy and are the key to reviving the Ten-Tails.

⚔️ 4. The World Refuses → War Begins

The nations (ninja villages) discovered the plan and rejected it because:

  • It removes human freedom

  • It enforces a false peace through control

So Obito Uchiha declared:

💥 “If you don’t cooperate... I’ll fight you all!”

➡️ And that’s how the Fourth Great Ninja War began.
All nations united against a single enemy.

🧬 5. The Hidden Mastermind: Madara

Behind everything stands the most dangerous figure:
Madara Uchiha

  • A legendary warrior

  • Stronger than most ninja

  • The original mind behind the plan

💀 His presence escalated the war into a global catastrophe.

🔥 Quick Summary

The war happened because:

  • Someone wanted to impose a “fake peace”

  • He needed immense power to control the world

  • The world رفض that idea

  • And legendary figures made things far worse

🚀 Second: Future Events (Titles Only – No Spoilers)

⚡ Phase 1: The War Begins

  • The nations unite

  • A massive enemy army appears

🧟 Phase 2: The Dead Return

  • Powerful ninja from the past come back

  • Emotional and psychological battles intensify

🔥 Phase 3: Legends Enter the Battlefield

  • Extremely powerful figures join the fight

  • The balance of power shifts

⚔️ Phase 4: Rising Climax

  • Major battles between top characters

  • Shocking truths begin to surface

🌑 Phase 5: The Greater Truth

  • The real plan is revealed

  • An even bigger threat emerges

💥 Phase 6: The Final Outcome

  • A decisive confrontation

  • The fate of the entire world is determined
